name: ATN Check Cashing
description_short: ATN Financial Services operates 7 check-cashing locations across New York City with extended hours and phone-based support for financial transactions.
description_long:
ATN Financial Services is a regional check-cashing operator headquartered in Valley Stream, New York, with locations strategically distributed across Queens, the Bronx, and Long Island. The company has maintained a physical presence in the NYC metropolitan area, serving communities that rely on cash-based financial services and transactions outside traditional banking hours.

ATN Financial Services provides check-cashing services as their primary offering, supported by a network of 7 locations with direct phone contact available at each branch. The company operates extended hours at multiple locations, with some stores open until midnight (Store #7 in Elmhurst) and several offering early morning service starting at 7:00 AM. All locations provide phone support for customer inquiries, though the website does not specify what additional services (money orders, wire transfers, bill payment) may be available beyond check cashing.

The company's distinguishing characteristic is their geographic coverage of underserved neighborhoods in Queens and the Bronx combined with significantly extended operating hours compared to traditional banks. Store #7 in Elmhurst operates 7:00 AM to midnight Monday-Friday and 8:00 AM to midnight Saturday-Sunday, providing unusual accessibility for time-constrained workers. Multiple locations open at 7:00 AM, addressing early-morning check-cashing needs that banks typically do not accommodate.

A significant limitation is that the website provides minimal information about fees, exchange rates, or specific service offerings beyond check cashing. No pricing transparency, verification of licensing status, or details about money orders, wire transfers, or bill payment services are disclosed online. The company's website appears to be location-focused only, with no customer reviews, detailed service descriptions, or regulatory disclosures visible to consumers researching the company.
pros: 7 physical locations across Queens, the Bronx, and Long Island for accessibility
Extended hours at multiple locations, including 7:00 AM openings and midnight closings
Store #7 (Elmhurst) operates until midnight seven days a week
Direct phone contact available at every location for customer service
Sunday hours available at 5 of 7 locations for weekend access
Multiple early-opening stores (7:00 AM) for pre-work check cashing
Long operational history serving NYC communities
cons: Website provides no fee structure, exchange rates, or pricing information
No disclosure of services beyond check cashing (money orders, wire transfers unclear)
No customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials visible on website
Minimal regulatory or licensing information provided to consumers
Website is location-only with no detailed company background or service descriptions
best_for: Workers with early morning or late evening schedules needing check access outside bank hours
Unbanked or underbanked consumers in Queens and Bronx communities
Individuals without nearby bank access seeking Sunday check-cashing services
diagnosis: ATN Financial Services is best for shift workers and unbanked consumers in the NYC area who need check-cashing access during extended or weekend hours when traditional banks are closed. The primary caveat is the complete lack of fee transparency and limited online information about specific services, requiring customers to call locations directly for pricing and full service details.
services: Phone-based customer service at each location
Extended weekday hours (7:00 AM to midnight at select locations)
Weekend hours (Saturday and Sunday at most locations)
